headings.text: Windows Logon Failure Status and Sub-Status Codes

overview: | Status/Sub Status Code | Description | | --- | --- | | 0xC000005E | The logon servers are not available to service the logon request. | | 0xC0000064 | The specified user does not exist. | | 0xC000006A | Misspelled or bad password. | | 0xC000006C | Password policy not met | | 0xC000006D | Bad username or authentication information. | | 0xC000006E | The user

study.overview: | Status/Sub Status Code | Description | | --- | --- | | 0xC000005E | The logon servers are not available to service the logon request. | | 0xC0000064 | The specified user does not exist. | | 0xC000006A | Misspelled or bad password. | | 0xC000006C | Password policy not met | | 0xC000006D | Bad username or authentication information. | | 0xC000006E | The user
study.whySoc: Use this note as an analyst reference: understand the concept, identify the relevant telemetry, pivot through evidence, and document the decision path clearly.

workflow: Identify the user, host, process, network flow, or identity object involved.
Collect the highest-value logs first and preserve timestamps and assumptions.
